summary: BLOCK 592 Phase 2 Testing Complete - Unofficial Pill Position & Global Metadata Scrub. Backend: 7/7 tests passed. Frontend: All verifications passed. The 'Unofficial' pill is correctly positioned at bottom-left ABOVE the spin count with backdrop-blur-sm styling. The scrub endpoint successfully identifies and flags unofficial records.

backend: POST /api/admin/scrub-unofficial-metadata returns correct JSON structure: total_scanned, total_updated, newly_flagged_unofficial, newly_unflagged, errors
Scrub endpoint is idempotent (0 updates on re-run)
frontend: Unofficial pill (data-testid='unofficial-pill') visible on Merry Swiftmas records in collection
Pill positioned at bottom-10 left-2 (40px from bottom, 8px from left) - ABOVE spin count
Pill has backdrop blur styling: backdrop-filter: blur(12px)
Pill has correct background: rgba(74, 74, 74, 0.85) - steel gray with transparency
Unofficial pill does NOT appear on official records (Red, Taylor Swift self-titled)
Pill is correctly positioned ABOVE the spin count indicator

seed_data_creation: None - used existing unofficial records (Merry Swiftmas, Beautiful Eyes, Shiny Things by Taylor Swift)
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 592 Phase 2 features fully verified: 1) Unofficial pill relocated to bottom-left ABOVE spin count in AlbumArt.js (classes: !bottom-10 !left-2). 2) UnofficialPill.js has backdrop-blur-sm with blur(12px). 3) Admin scrub endpoint at /api/admin/scrub-unofficial-metadata works correctly - previously ran and flagged 3 records (Merry Swiftmas, Beautiful Eyes, Shiny Things). Re-running returns total_updated=0 (idempotent). Records with is_unofficial=true show the pill, official records do not.

scrub_endpoint_sample_response.errors_note: Some errors from Discogs rate limiting or deleted releases - expected behavior

unofficial_pill_css_verification.classes: absolute top-2 right-2 z-[6] text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full backdrop-blur-sm !top-auto !bottom-10 !left-2 !right-auto
